intro: The top of the funnel · finding the right companies, learning enough about them to be worth a reply, and reaching out at scale without sounding like a robot. This is the department most businesses try to hire their way out of. It is the one agents change first, because every job here is research, writing, and timing · and machines never get tired of any of it.

jobs.name: ICP Definition
jobs.desc: Define and refine ideal customer profiles per vertical · firmographics, pain patterns, buying triggers.

jobs.name: Market Mapping
jobs.desc: Map the total addressable companies in a target vertical before a campaign.

jobs.name: Trigger Detection
jobs.desc: Watch for buying signals · hiring, funding, tech changes, leadership moves.

jobs.name: Lookalike Modeling
jobs.desc: Build new target lists off the shape of your closed-won accounts.

jobs.name: Database Mining
jobs.desc: Pull targeted company and contact lists from structured databases.

jobs.name: Web & Maps Scraping
jobs.desc: Scrape local businesses, directories, and niche sources for leads.

jobs.name: Social Mining
jobs.desc: Harvest engaged audiences · post commenters, followers, group members.

jobs.name: List Building
jobs.desc: Merge, dedupe, and segment raw leads into campaign-ready lists.

jobs.name: Contact Enrichment
jobs.desc: Find and append emails, phones, and LinkedIn profiles to every lead.

jobs.name: Email Verification
jobs.desc: Validate every address before it ever gets a send.

jobs.name: Account Enrichment
jobs.desc: Layer firmographics, tech stack, and headcount trends onto target accounts.

jobs.name: Fit Scoring
jobs.desc: Score every lead against ICP so outreach spends effort where it converts.

jobs.name: Personalization Research
jobs.desc: Build a personalization dossier per prospect · hooks, context, common ground.

jobs.name: Cold Email Drafting
jobs.desc: Write multi-step cold email sequences tuned to the vertical and offer.

jobs.name: LinkedIn Messaging
jobs.desc: Draft connection notes and DM sequences that read human.

jobs.name: Proof Matching
jobs.desc: Match the right case study to each prospect’s industry and problem.

jobs.name: Cold-Call Scripting
jobs.desc: Call and voicemail scripts with branching objection handling that read human.

jobs.name: Video Prospecting
jobs.desc: Personalized video scripts · the hook, the personal line, the CTA, under 90 seconds.

jobs.name: Campaign Orchestration
jobs.desc: Build multi-channel cadences · email, LinkedIn, phone touches in order.

jobs.name: Campaign Launch
jobs.desc: Push finished campaigns into sending platforms with correct settings.

jobs.name: Deliverability
jobs.desc: Keep domains healthy · warmup, spam testing, inbox rotation.

jobs.name: Send Optimization
jobs.desc: Schedule sends by timezone and pace volume to protect reply rates.

intro: What happens after someone raises their hand · the reply gets read and routed, the meeting gets booked, the proposal gets written, the pipeline stays honest. Speed wins deals here, and speed is exactly what a human team loses as volume grows. The agents answer in minutes, draft before the next call, and never let a deal go quiet without flagging it.

jobs.name: Reply Classification
jobs.desc: Read every reply and tag it · interested, objection, referral, not now, never.

jobs.name: Objection Response
jobs.desc: Draft responses to common objections from a tuned library.

jobs.name: Hot-Lead Routing
jobs.desc: Route interested replies to the calendar and the pipeline instantly.

jobs.name: Meeting Booking
jobs.desc: Propose slots, book calls, chase no-shows.

jobs.name: Referral Capture
jobs.desc: Spot the "talk to my colleague" replies and action the warm intro.

jobs.name: Speed-to-Lead
jobs.desc: Acknowledge and engage every inbound lead within minutes.

jobs.name: Lead Qualification
jobs.desc: Parse intake forms and score inbound leads before a human looks.

jobs.name: Comment-CTA Fulfillment
jobs.desc: Detect keyword comments on content and deliver the promised asset by DM.

jobs.name: Inbox Triage
jobs.desc: Sort inbound email and DMs · client, lead, brand deal, noise.

jobs.name: Pre-Call Briefing
jobs.desc: Build a brief before every call · who, company, history, objectives, talking points.

jobs.name: Call Capture
jobs.desc: Record, transcribe, and file every meeting automatically.

jobs.name: Post-Call Debrief
jobs.desc: Extract outcomes, action items, and deal updates from the transcript.

jobs.name: Follow-Up Drafting
jobs.desc: Draft the recap email with next steps before the prospect forgets the call.

jobs.name: Objection Library
jobs.desc: Mine every call for the objections that come up · build the rebuttals that win.

jobs.name: Demo Prototyping
jobs.desc: Turn discovery notes into a working visual prototype before the next meeting.

jobs.name: Proposal Generation
jobs.desc: Generate branded proposals rendered to PDF from call context.

jobs.name: Deal Room Assembly
jobs.desc: Spin up tracked, password-gated deal rooms per prospect.

jobs.name: Agreement Drafting
jobs.desc: Produce the services agreement the moment a deal closes verbally.

jobs.name: Pricing Support
jobs.desc: Model anchors, phase structures, and ROI comparisons per deal.

jobs.name: CRM Hygiene
jobs.desc: Keep records deduped, fields normalized, stages honest.

jobs.name: Pipeline Reporting
jobs.desc: Weekly pipeline state · what moved, what stalled, what closes next.

jobs.name: Forecasting
jobs.desc: Probability-weight the pipeline into a revenue forecast.

jobs.name: Reactivation
jobs.desc: Revive dormant deals and win back lost ones on a schedule.

jobs.name: Win/Loss Analysis
jobs.desc: Tag why deals close or die; feed patterns back into targeting.

intro: The engine that makes you known · reading what works, making more of it, and pushing one good idea across every surface before the trend moves. Most teams post and pray. This department measures every piece against the median, doubles down on the winners, and turns a single reel into nine assets · so output stops depending on whoever felt inspired that week.

jobs.name: Performance Mining
jobs.desc: Rank your own content corpus · what worked, what to re-hash.

jobs.name: Trend Monitoring
jobs.desc: Watch the niche for breaking topics and rising formats.

jobs.name: Competitor Analysis
jobs.desc: Scrape and transcribe competitor content; extract hook patterns.

jobs.name: Audience Analysis
jobs.desc: Mine comments and DMs for questions, objections, and content ideas.

jobs.name: Hook Writing
jobs.desc: Generate and rank hooks per platform from proven patterns.

jobs.name: Script Writing
jobs.desc: Full reel and video scripts in the house voice.

jobs.name: Caption Writing
jobs.desc: Platform-correct captions with CTA placement rules baked in.

jobs.name: Carousel Production
jobs.desc: Design and export branded carousel slides.

jobs.name: Video Production
jobs.desc: Programmatic video · overlays, captions, motion graphics on recordings.

jobs.name: Image Generation
jobs.desc: Brand-consistent images from reference libraries.

jobs.name: Thumbnail & Cover Design
jobs.desc: Scroll-stopping thumbnails and covers tuned to earn the click.

jobs.name: Ad Creative
jobs.desc: Generate and iterate paid-ad variations · hooks, angles, formats.

jobs.name: Landing Page Copy
jobs.desc: Conversion copy for the whole page · hero, proof, offer, FAQ, CTA.

jobs.name: Deck Production
jobs.desc: Webinar and talk decks in the brand design system.

jobs.name: Cross-Platform Adaptation
jobs.desc: One idea → native formats for every platform.

jobs.name: Clip Extraction
jobs.desc: Cut long recordings into short-form clips worth posting.

jobs.name: Lead-Magnet Builds
jobs.desc: Turn content themes into gated guides and landing pages.

jobs.name: Publishing
jobs.desc: Schedule and post across platforms via API.

jobs.name: Newsletter & Broadcast
jobs.desc: Design and send the weekly email in the brand system.

jobs.name: SEO & GEO
jobs.desc: Make the site legible to search engines and LLMs.

jobs.name: OG & Share Surface
jobs.desc: Every page ships with share-ready open-graph imagery.

jobs.name: Deal Scripting
jobs.desc: Sponsored scripts in the proven format, per brand brief.

jobs.name: Approval Docs
jobs.desc: Brand-safe formatted docs for sponsor sign-off.

intro: Where promises become delivery · onboarding a new client, wiring the systems, testing the work, and reporting status before anyone has to ask. Delivery dies in week one or it doesn’t. This department makes the first week feel like the tenth, catches the broken batch before the client sees it, and sends the Friday update that keeps trust alive through the quiet stretches.

jobs.name: Kickoff Pack
jobs.desc: Welcome email, access checklist, and project scaffold the day a deal closes.

jobs.name: Access Collection
jobs.desc: Chase and verify every credential and API key needed to build.

jobs.name: Project Scaffolding
jobs.desc: Stand up the repo, context files, and plan for a new engagement.

jobs.name: Document Extraction
jobs.desc: High-volume structured extraction from client documents.

jobs.name: Integration Builds
jobs.desc: Wire client systems together · CRMs, calendars, transcripts, payments.

jobs.name: Data Migration
jobs.desc: Move and clean data between systems without losing or mangling a row.

jobs.name: Portal Provisioning
jobs.desc: Spin up client-scoped delivery portals with live status.

jobs.name: QA & Verification
jobs.desc: Verify every build against real data before the client sees it.

jobs.name: Agent Evaluation
jobs.desc: Test agent outputs against a benchmark before they touch real work.

jobs.name: Monitoring & Alerting
jobs.desc: Watch every automation for failures and silent stalls · know before the client does.

jobs.name: Cost & Usage Tracking
jobs.desc: Token and API spend tracked against budget · no surprise bills.

jobs.name: Incident Response
jobs.desc: When an automation breaks · triage, root-cause, fix, and write the note.

jobs.name: Status Updates
jobs.desc: Clients see progress without asking for it.

jobs.name: Meeting Follow-Ups
jobs.desc: Client call transcripts → action items → assigned and tracked.

jobs.name: Portal Sync
jobs.desc: Session summaries and deliverables flow into the client portal automatically.

jobs.name: Transcript Processing
jobs.desc: Every meeting becomes searchable, structured context.

jobs.name: Context Maintenance
jobs.desc: Per-client context files stay current as work happens.

jobs.name: SOP Generation
jobs.desc: Turn delivered work into reusable playbooks.

jobs.name: Handoff Docs
jobs.desc: Clean documentation when a system ships to the client.

intro: The floor that makes everyone else sharper · company dossiers before every call, the trends worth filming, the competitors you can’t afford to be surprised by. Research is cheap and being wrong is expensive. This department turns two-day digging jobs into twenty-minute briefs, so no one upstairs ever walks into a room guessing.

jobs.name: Company Deep-Dive
jobs.desc: Financials, growth signals, org structure, strategic posture.

jobs.name: Tech-Stack Detection
jobs.desc: What a target company runs, and where the gaps are.

jobs.name: Funding & Financials Lookup
jobs.desc: Rounds, investors, revenue estimates, filings · who just got budget.

jobs.name: Buying-Committee Mapping
jobs.desc: Who actually decides · economic buyer, champion, blockers, their roles.

jobs.name: Person Research
jobs.desc: Background, content trail, interests, mutual ground for any contact.

jobs.name: Network Mapping
jobs.desc: Who knows whom · paths into a target account.

jobs.name: Warm-Path Finding
jobs.desc: The shortest real intro path into a target account · who can connect you.

jobs.name: Competitor Teardown
jobs.desc: Pricing, positioning, strengths, weaknesses, exploitable gaps.

jobs.name: Vertical Analysis
jobs.desc: Is this vertical worth entering · demand, budgets, buying behavior.

jobs.name: Pricing Research
jobs.desc: What the market charges, anchors, and packaging patterns.

jobs.name: TAM / Market Sizing
jobs.desc: How many companies actually fit · the real size of the prize.

jobs.name: Account Monitoring
jobs.desc: Watch a target list for funding, hiring, leadership, and tech changes · ongoing.

jobs.name: News & Mention Tracking
jobs.desc: Every mention of your brand, competitors, and topics · as it lands.

jobs.name: Alert Routing
jobs.desc: The signals that matter reach the right person · the noise gets filtered.

jobs.name: Research Reports
jobs.desc: Any question → structured, cited report with diagrams.

jobs.name: Data Visualization
jobs.desc: Turn a pile of research into charts and diagrams that explain themselves.

jobs.name: Adversarial Verification
jobs.desc: Claims get attacked before they get believed.

intro: Everything that happens after the sale · answering the repeat questions, watching for the accounts about to slip, and keeping the community alive. Churn rarely comes from bad work · it comes from silence. This department deflects the tickets that don’t need a human, spots the amber before it goes red, and renews accounts months early.

jobs.name: Ticket Triage
jobs.desc: Classify, prioritize, and route every support request the moment it lands.

jobs.name: FAQ & Self-Serve
jobs.desc: Answer the questions that repeat · and turn them into living help content.

jobs.name: Escalations
jobs.desc: Spot the angry, the churn-risk, and the edge case · and get a human there fast.

jobs.name: Macro Authoring
jobs.desc: Turn the tickets that repeat into canned, on-brand responses agents reuse.

jobs.name: Onboarding Journeys
jobs.desc: Guide every new customer through activation, step by step.

jobs.name: Health Scoring
jobs.desc: Score every account on usage, sentiment, and engagement · before renewal season.

jobs.name: Churn Prediction
jobs.desc: Predict which accounts are about to slip · before the usage even dips.

jobs.name: Renewals & Expansion
jobs.desc: Time renewal conversations and spot upsell openings.

jobs.name: Advocacy & Referrals
jobs.desc: Turn your happiest customers into referrals, reviews, and case studies.

jobs.name: QBR Prep
jobs.desc: Build the quarterly business review from real account data.

jobs.name: Engagement & Replies
jobs.desc: Every member question and mention gets a response in the house voice.

jobs.name: Moderation
jobs.desc: Keep the space clean · spam, conduct, and noise handled quietly.

jobs.name: Member Spotlights
jobs.desc: Find and celebrate member wins · the retention engine.

jobs.name: Event Coordination
jobs.desc: Run the AMAs, calls, and spotlights on a cadence the community can count on.

intro: The unglamorous floor that keeps the lights on · invoices out and money in, the numbers reporting themselves every Monday, contracts and records that never go missing. Nobody starts a company to chase late payments. This department runs the admin on a schedule so the founder stops being the bottleneck for getting paid.

jobs.name: Invoice Generation
jobs.desc: Branded invoices per entity, currency, and tax treatment.

jobs.name: Payment Tracking
jobs.desc: Know what’s paid, due, and late · without opening a bank app.

jobs.name: Collections
jobs.desc: Overdue invoices get chased politely and persistently.

jobs.name: Revenue Reporting
jobs.desc: Monthly revenue truth across entities and currencies.

jobs.name: Goal Pacing
jobs.desc: Tracking against the income target, with pace forecasts.

jobs.name: Cash-Flow Forecasting
jobs.desc: Project cash in and out · know your runway before it becomes an emergency.

jobs.name: Budget Tracking
jobs.desc: Spend vs budget by category, with overruns flagged early.

jobs.name: CRM Sync
jobs.desc: Deals, contacts, and statuses stay current everywhere.

jobs.name: Expense Categorization
jobs.desc: Spend categorized for the accountant before they ask.

jobs.name: Document Filing & Retrieval
jobs.desc: Every document named, filed, and findable in ten seconds.

jobs.name: Contract Lifecycle
jobs.desc: Renewals, expiries, and obligations tracked so nothing sneaks up.

jobs.name: Entity Compliance
jobs.desc: Filings and obligations per entity, tracked and scheduled.

jobs.name: Calendar Management
jobs.desc: Scheduling, conflicts, buffers, and timezone math handled.

jobs.name: Email Triage
jobs.desc: The inbox sorted by what actually needs the human.

jobs.name: Candidate Sourcing
jobs.desc: Find and rank candidates for open roles across platforms.

jobs.name: Screening & Scheduling
jobs.desc: First-pass screens and interview logistics, handled.

jobs.name: Onboarding & Training
jobs.desc: New hires get the playbooks, access, and 30-day plan automatically.

jobs.name: HR & Policy Assistant
jobs.desc: Answer staff policy questions from the real handbook · leave, expenses, onboarding admin.
